race.name: Tour of Georgia Gran Fondo
race.tagline: Challenging timed-segment Gran Fondo through North Georgia Mountains

vitals.start_finish: Parking lot in front of La Cabaña Mexican Restaurant, 707 Edelweiss Strasse, Helen, GA 30545
vitals.format: Timed-segment racing (placement by combined segment times, not overall)

climate.overview: Spring in North Georgia Mountains; mild temperatures with potential for variable weather including rain.

terrain.overview: Steep climbs, quiet country roads, scenic views, thrilling descents through National Forest lands and mountain gaps.

logistics.explanation: Well-supported with aid, sag, motos; clear parking and staging in charming Helen.

length.explanation: Gran offers epic 90mi/9k ft; options for all levels.

technicality.explanation: Road riding; no gravel or tech features.

elevation.explanation: Brutal 9,000ft on Gran; serious climber's test.

climate.explanation: Spring GA mountains: pleasant but wet risk.

adventure.explanation: Remote Appalachian roads, gaps, forest views.

prestige.explanation: GFNS series event; solid but not elite pro.

race_quality.explanation: Timed segments, awards, jerseys; pro organization.

experience.explanation: Bavarian village vibe, swag, raffle, podiums.

expenses.explanation: Reasonable entry; travel to remote GA adds cost.

cultural_impact.explanation: Regional GFNS stop; growing US gran fondo scene.

biased_opinion.overview: A gravel god's road detour: savage climbs and series polish make the Gran a bucket-list sufferfest, even without dirt.

final_verdict.one_liner: Elite climbing gran fondo in alpine Georgia—pure vertical pain with Bavarian charm.
final_verdict.full_verdict: Top-tier GFNS event with massive elevation, timed KOMs, full support, and series perks. Gran route crushes souls over big gaps; perfect for roadies chasing suffering and swag.

logistics.overview: Staged mass start from Helen parking lot; mandatory bib/plate/chip; 10mph progression cutoff; app for results/GPS.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels in Bavarian-themed Helen; book early for event weekend.
logistics.registration_notes: $160 Gran/Medio until Jan 8 2026, up to $200 on-site; includes event jersey if early.

history.overview: Part of Gran Fondo National Series (est. 2012); Stop 2; no specific event founding year found.
notable_moments: Picks for best Southeast road events
Custom Suarez kits for Gran age winners

course_description.character: Crisscrosses Appalachian Trail through North Georgia Mountains: steep climbs, secluded roads, National Forest, mountain gaps.
course_description.signature_challenge: 9,000ft Gran with 4 timed climbs over brutal gaps

guide_variables.cutoff: 10mph progression (includes stops); no exceptions on Gran/Medio

non_negotiables: Right side of road for segments

citations.title: Tour of Georgia Gran Fondo 2026 - Rated
Reviving the Tour of Georgia - Gran Fondo Guide
